The '''Cassander subsector''' was one of three [[Sector/Legends|subsectors]] formed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] after its [[Annexation of the Cassandran Worlds|annexation]] of the [[Cassandran Worlds/Legends|Cassandran Worlds]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. The region was re-named the Cassandran Sectors and divided into the Cassander subsector, the [[Tadrin sector/Legends|Tadrin sector]], and the [[Tendrannan sector/Legends|Tendrannan sector]]. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Cassander]] was made the sector's [[Capital/Legends|capital]].<ref name="Geonosis" /> In addition to the [[Cassander system/Legends|Cassander system]], other [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] of the Cassander sector included the [[Altunna system/Legends|Altunna system]], [[Forsen system/Legends|Forsen system]], [[Ord Canfre system/Legends|Ord Canfre system]], and [[Peldon Minor system/Legends|Peldon Minor system]].<ref name="TEAOC" />
